channel.title: Tech Projects on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Projects on Home

item.title: VC6 Linker Surgery: Cross-Temporal ABI Compatibility
item.description: Resolving 'LNK2005' and symbol collisions between legacy Visual C++ 6.0 (VC6) environments and modern build systems via symbol hijacking and static linking hacks.

item.title: USB HID Protocols: Solving the 'Sacrificial Byte' & F&R Challenges
item.description: Designing a custom fragmentation protocol for USB HID and debugging low-level Windows driver quirks that 'swallowed' critical data bytes.

item.title: Web3 Indexer: Go Engine Architecture
item.description: Re-engineering a high-availability EVM blockchain indexer from TypeScript to Go, achieving 10x throughput and 99.9% data durability.

item.title: Physical Entropy: Utilizing CPU Jitter to Defeat Deterministic Attacks
item.description: Harvesting micro-physical entropy from the bare metal using RDTSC and RDRAND to defend against collision attacks in high-value private key generation.

item.title: Air-Gapped Hardening: Surgical Linux Kernel Customization
item.description: Reducing the attack surface and boot latency of air-gapped systems by stripping the Linux kernel down to its minimal functional primitives.

item.title: Kernel Surgery: Stripping Linux 3.6.1 to 3.0MB
item.description: A deep-dive into building a hyper-secure, 3.0MB Linux kernel in a strictly air-gapped environment for cryptographic appliances.
